| 19 | Hungarian | 0.070 | Tömegbalesetet okozott a rendkívüli havazás az Egyesült Államokban is. | The extraordinary snowfall also caused a mass accident in the United States. |
| 20 | Hebrew | 0.070 | מאות תושבים תקפו את משטרת עזה באבנים ובמוטות ברזל. | Hundreds of residents attacked the Gaza police with stones and iron rods. |
| 21 | Urdu | 0.069 | 6 جون 1993ء کو ستیہ سائی پر ان کی ایک بااعتماد مددگار نے ناکام قاتلانہ حملہ بھی کیا تھا۔ | On June 6, 1993, a trusted aide also made a failed assassination attempt on Sathya Sai. |
| 22 | Danish | 0.068 | Angrebet kom efter, at byen natten igennem var blevet ramt af 400 raketter. | The attack came after the city had been hit by 400 rockets throughout the night. |
| 23 | Romanian | 0.066 | Gripa aviară a provocat primul deces în rândul populației thailandeze. | Bird flu caused the first death among the Thai population. |
| 24 | Hungarian | 0.066 | Két ember életét vesztette a balesetekben, s sokakat kellett kórházba szállítani sérülésekkel is. | Two people lost their lives in the accidents, and many had to be hospitalized with injuries as well. |
| 25 | Arabic | 0.066 | وقبل عامين، قتل 1082 شخصا في أكبر انفجار لأنبوب نفط خلال محاولات سحب النفط منه. | Two years ago, 1,082 people were killed in the largest oil pipeline explosion during attempts to siphon oil from it. |

**Language weights:** Hebrew (6), Hungarian (3), Tamil (2), Urdu (3), Korean (2), Japanese, Dutch, Chinese, Romanian, Danish, Arabic, English.

**Term/semantic pattern:** Sudden discrete events involving casualties, destruction, or creation. The INS position is consistently occupied by clauses where something new enters existence as a fait accompli — deaths, attacks, outbreaks, collapses, explosions. The grammar is past-tense completion; the semantic content is irreversible instantiation. The corpus finds INS most cleanly in conflict and disaster reporting across South Asian, Middle Eastern, and East Asian language corpora.

---

## SEG — DIFFERENTIATING × STRUCTURE

**Draw boundary.** Something is partitioned, divided, set apart from the rest. The operation separates elements within a structure — not recognizing absence (NUL) but actively drawing a line.

**Top 25 exemplars by discrimination margin:**

| # | Language | Δ | Original | Translation |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Slovak | 0.095 | Samozrejme, že sa mala rozdeliť na tri rovnaké diely. | Of course, it should have been divided into three equal parts. |
| 2 | Japanese | 0.090 | 柵などをくぐると別行動になる。 | Once you go through the fence or similar, you act independently. |
| 3 | Swedish | 0.082 | Industriländerna (USA, Sovjet, Sverige etc) använder en mycket större del av sin nationalprodukt på utbildning (fem procent). | Industrialized countries (USA, Soviet Union, Sweden etc.) use a much larger share of their national product on education (five percent). |
| 4 | Swedish | 0.080 | Han utgår från tumregeln att u-ländernas befolkning är fördelad med 80 procent på landsbygden och 20 procent i städerna. | He starts from the rule of thumb that developing countries' populations are distributed 80 percent in rural areas and 20 percent in cities. |
| 5 | Serbian | 0.073 | Mnogi istaknuti članovi su otišli iz stranke. | Many prominent members have left the party. |
| 6 | Ukrainian | 0.073 | Тільки десята частина з них застосовується як вторинні матеріальні ресурси, а решта потрапляє у сховища... | Only a tenth of them are used as secondary material resources, while the rest end up in storage facilities... |
| 7 | Ukrainian | 0.072 | Тютюновий дим, розділений течією повітря, незадоволено клублячись, розріджується. | Tobacco smoke, divided by the airflow, dissipates reluctantly in billowing clouds. |
| 8 | Swedish | 0.072 | Om alla världens resurser skulle fördelas rättvist och upp till USA:s nuvarande förbrukning, skulle de bara räcka för en kort tid. | If all the world's resources were distributed fairly up to the US's current consumption level, they would only last for a short time. |
| 9 | Swedish | 0.070 | Årsklass 1905 kan t.ex. få högst 11/20 av full pension, årsklass 1906 kan få högst 12/20... | Birth year 1905 can receive at most 11/20 of full pension, birth year 1906 at most 12/20... |
| 10 | Ancient Greek | 0.070 | τοὺς γὰρ ἑωυτοῦ ἕκαστος ὑμέων πολιήτας πειράσθω ἀποσχίζων ἀπὸ τοῦ λοιποῦ συμμαχικοῦ | Let each of you try to separate your own citizens from the rest of the alliance. |
| 11 | Croatian | 0.069 | Ako je stranka iznevjerila njegova stajališta, logično je da je napusti. | If the party has betrayed his positions, it is logical that he should leave it. |
| 12 | Swedish | 0.069 | Man kan dock avtala om att sådan egendom som annars skulle ha ingått i giftorätten ska vara enskild egendom. | However, one can agree that property which would otherwise have been part of marital property shall be separate property. |
| 13 | Danish | 0.069 | Når man henter råolie op fra jorden, foretager man en adskillelse af råolien i dens bestanddele... | When extracting crude oil from the ground, one performs a separation of the crude oil into its components... |
| 14 | Danish | 0.068 | Fedtsyrerne deles op i mættede, fleurmættede og monoumættede typer. | Fatty acids are divided into saturated, polyunsaturated, and monounsaturated types. |
| 15 | Bulgarian | 0.068 | Земята се делеше, а плодът на дървото оставаше общ. | The land was divided, but the fruit of the trees remained communal. |
| 16 | Slovenian | 0.068 | Domovanja dobrih 400 prebivalcev so raztresena na več kilometrih in le redko se v Čepincih več hiš drži skupaj. | The homes of about 400 residents are scattered over several kilometers and only rarely do more houses stand together in Čepinci. |
| 17 | Swedish | 0.068 | U-länderna har 72 procent av världens befolkning, men bara 11 procent av världens utbildningsbudget. | Developing countries have 72 percent of the world's population but only 11 percent of the world's education budget. |
| 18 | Swedish | 0.067 | Denna innebär bl.a. att vardera maken vid äktenskapets upplösning har rätt till hälften av den andre makens tillgångar. | This means among other things that each spouse upon dissolution of the marriage is entitled to half of the other spouse's assets. |
| 19 | Swedish | 0.067 | Svalget mellan industriländer och utvecklingsländer kommer bara att bli större. | The gap between industrialized and developing countries will only grow larger. |
| 20 | Russian | 0.064 | Как рассказали политики, ряд видных партийцев уже выразили свое нежелание оставаться в рядах СПС. | As politicians reported, a number of prominent party members have already expressed their unwillingness to remain in the ranks of the SPS. |
| 21 | Hebrew | 0.063 | פדרציה אחרת העומדת להתפרק היא יוגוסלוויה, וגם שם פרצו ויפרצו קרבות מרים... | Another federation about to break up is Yugoslavia, and there too bitter battles have broken out and will break out... |
| 22 | Ukrainian | 0.063 | При цьому частка сільськогосподарських підприємств у загальнообласному обсязі виробництва не перевищує... | At the same time the share of agricultural enterprises in the total regional production volume does not exceed... |
| 23 | Serbian | 0.063 | Ako je stranka izneverila njegove stavove, logičan korak je napustiti je. | If the party has betrayed his positions, the logical step is to leave it. |
| 24 | Swedish | 0.062 | Men disse land — der tre fjärdedelar av jordens befolkning bor — skiljer sig naturligtvis starkt från varandra. | But these countries — where three-quarters of the world's population live — naturally differ greatly from one another. |
| 25 | Swedish | 0.062 | Även med en jämn fördelning av produktionen blir det inte tillräckligt för var och en. | Even with an even distribution of production it will not be sufficient for each person. |

**Language weights:** Swedish (11), Ukrainian (3), Serbian (2), Danish (2), Slovak, Japanese, Ancient Greek, Croatian, Bulgarian, Slovenian, Russian, Hebrew.

**Term/semantic pattern:** Statistical distributions, partitions, separations, divisions. The SEG position is dominated by clauses that draw boundaries within a structure — percentages allocated, populations distributed, assets divided, parties split. Swedish analytical prose is the strongest carrier, with its tradition of distributional comparison and systematic partitioning.

---

## CON — RELATING × STRUCTURE

**Connect across boundary.** Two or more things are held in relation — co-present, associated, participating together in something. The operation maintains a connection across a structural boundary.

**Top 25 exemplars by discrimination margin:**

| # | Language | Δ | Original | Translation |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Croatian | 0.066 | Makedonski predsjednik Đorđe Ivanov i njegov kolega Vaclav Klaus nazočili su makedonsko-češkom poslovnom forumu. | Macedonian President Đorđe Ivanov and his colleague Vaclav Klaus attended the Macedonian-Czech business forum. |
| 2 | Hindi | 0.065 | मुकेश अपनी पत्नी नीता के साथ आनंद जैन की बेटी की शादी में शामिल होंगे। | Mukesh will attend the wedding of Anand Jain's daughter together with his wife Nita. |
| 3 | Norwegian | 0.064 | Mandag 7. april vil de to landenes flagg få plass sammen med de andre utenfor NATO-hovedkvarteret i Brussel. | On Monday April 7, the flags of the two countries will take their place alongside the others outside NATO headquarters in Brussels. |
| 4 | Polish | 0.064 | Małe dziecko w różowej czapce jest trzymane przez mężczyznę w czerwonej bluzce, a obok stoi kobieta. | A small child in a pink hat is being held by a man in a red top, and a woman stands beside them. |
| 5 | Serbian | 0.063 | Diplomatski dnevnik: Zemlje regiona razgovaraju o saradnji. | Diplomatic diary: Countries of the region discuss cooperation. |
| 6 | Croatian | 0.063 | Dijete razgovara s Djedom Božićnjakom i vilenjakom u radionici Djeda Božićnjaka postavljenoj za djecu u Ateni. | A child talks with Santa Claus and an elf in Santa's workshop set up for children in central Athens. |
| 7 | Polish | 0.063 | Dziewczynka z nartami na nogach i chłopiec z deską snowboardową jadą wyciągiem narciarskim. | A girl with skis on her feet and a boy with a snowboard ride the ski lift. |
| 8 | Croatian | 0.062 | Glavni tajnik NATO-a Jaap de Hoop Scheffer (desno) i Crvenkovski razgovaraju s izvjestiteljima nakon sastanka. | NATO Secretary-General Jaap de Hoop Scheffer (right) and Crvenkovski speak with reporters after the meeting. |
| 9 | Indonesian | 0.061 | Anak-anak, wanita dan orang tua berkumpul di Potocari untuk mencari perlindungan dari pasukan Belanda. | Children, women and the elderly gathered in Potocari to seek protection from Dutch forces. |
| 10 | Croatian | 0.061 | Diplomatski dnevnik: Zemlje regije razgovaraju o suradnji. | Diplomatic diary: Countries of the region discuss cooperation. |
| 11 | Spanish | 0.061 | José Luis participa en representación del Grupo en las conversaciones auspiciadas por el histórico dirigente nacionalista... | José Luis participates on behalf of the Group in the talks sponsored by the historic nationalist leader... |
| 12 | Serbian | 0.060 | Makedonski predsednik Đorđe Ivanov i njegov češki kolega Vaclav Klaus prisustvovali su makedonsko-češkom poslovnom forumu. | Macedonian President Đorđe Ivanov and his Czech colleague Vaclav Klaus attended the Macedonian-Czech business forum. |
| 13 | Urdu | 0.060 | جبکہ جناب شیخ عبید بن عثمان العمودی اور جناب غلام حامد خان نقشبندی مہمان خصوصی کی حیثیت سے شرکت کریں گے۔ | While Sheikh Ubaid bin Uthman Al-Amudi and Ghulam Hamid Khan Naqshbandi will participate as special guests. |
| 14 | Czech | 0.059 | Na léto mám předběžnou smlouvu s firmou Jeka, která zprostředkovává turistický ruch mezi Belgií a ČR. | For the summer I have a preliminary contract with company Jeka, which mediates tourism between Belgium and the Czech Republic. |
| 15 | Polish | 0.059 | Chłopak biegnie, asekurując jadącego obok rowerem chłopca w kasku na głowie. | A boy runs alongside, supporting the boy riding a bicycle next to him wearing a helmet. |
| 16 | Polish | 0.058 | Mężczyzna trzyma na rękach chłopca pod przezroczystym parasolem. | A man holds a boy in his arms under a transparent umbrella. |
| 17 | Serbian | 0.057 | Setimes: Posetili ste makedonske mirovnjake u Iraku. | Setimes: You visited the Macedonian peacekeepers in Iraq. |
| 18 | Polish | 0.057 | Przed kolejną gonitwą wszyscy idą popatrzeć na padok, gdzie zaprezentują się wystawione do niej konie. | Before the next race, everyone goes to look at the paddock where the horses entered for it will be presented. |
| 19 | Croatian | 0.057 | Američki predsjednik George W. Bush (lijevo) razgovara s makedonskim predsjednikom Brankom Crvenkovskim (u sredini). | U.S. President George W. Bush (left) speaks with Macedonian President Branko Crvenkovski (center). |
| 20 | Serbian | 0.057 | Generalni sekretar NATO Jap de Hop Shefer (desno) i Crvenkovski obraćaju se novinarima. | NATO Secretary-General Jaap de Hoop Scheffer (right) and Crvenkovski address reporters. |
| 21 | Polish | 0.057 | Współpraca ma polegać na tym, że jeżdżąc po świecie Wałęsa będzie szukać pomocy. | The cooperation is to consist of Wałęsa traveling around the world seeking assistance. |
| 22 | Croatian | 0.057 | Setimes: Posjetili ste makedonske vojnike koji čuvaju mir u Iraku. | Setimes: You visited the Macedonian soldiers maintaining peace in Iraq. |
| 23 | Serbian | 0.056 | Pomoćnik američkog državnog sekretara Danijel Frid kontaktirao je šeficu grčke diplomatije Doru Bakojanis. | U.S. Assistant Secretary of State Daniel Fried contacted Greek Foreign Minister Dora Bakoyannis. |
| 24 | Polish | 0.055 | Chłopak płynie po wodzie na desce, trzymając se liny. | A boy rides on a board over the water, holding a rope. |
| 25 | Vietnamese | 0.055 | Ông được điều về đơn vị thông tin thuộc sư đoàn 2, quân khu 5. | He was transferred to the information unit of the 2nd Division, Military Region 5. |

**Language weights:** Croatian (6), Polish (6), Serbian (5), Norwegian, Hindi, Indonesian, Spanish, Urdu, Czech, Vietnamese.

**Term/semantic pattern:** Two or more specific agents co-present in a structured context. The CON position is densely populated by diplomatic and photographic description — two presidents attending a forum together, flags taking their place alongside others, a child held by a man while a woman stands beside. The South Slavic languages (Croatian, Serbian) and Polish dominate, sharing a grammar that naturally encodes participation, co-attendance, and structured co-presence with minimal interpretive loading.

---

## SYN — GENERATING × STRUCTURE

**Merge into emergent whole.** Parts integrate into something that exceeds their sum — a new structural unity is produced. The operation synthesizes rather than connects.

**Top 25 exemplars by discrimination margin:**

| # | Language | Δ | Original | Translation |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Slovak | 0.113 | Zrekonštruuje Legislatívnu radu vlády Slovenskej republiky s cieľom jej aktívnejšieho pôsobenia v legislatívno-technickom procese. | It will reconstruct the Legislative Council of the Slovak Republic Government with the aim of its more active functioning in the legislative-technical process. |
| 2 | Hindi | 0.109 | केंद्र की कोशिश है कि कानून लागू करने से पहले इस कार्यक्रम के तहत काम पाने वाले लोगों के नाम पंचायतों में दर्ज हो जाएं। | The center is trying to ensure that the names of people who get work under this program are registered in panchayats before the law is implemented. |
| 3 | Hindi | 0.107 | इस पर विस्तृत योजना तैयार की जा रही है। | A detailed plan is being prepared on this. |
| 4 | Urdu | 0.106 | اجلاس میں نئے ٹیکس قانون کا بھی جائزہ لیا جائے گا جو کہ موجودہ انکم ٹیکس قانون کی جگہ لے گا۔ | The session will also review the new tax law that will replace the current income tax law. |
| 5 | Hindi | 0.103 | لیکن اب نئی ऊर्जा नीति में इस योजना को पूरी तरह से लाइसेंस मुक्त करने का प्रस्ताव है। | But now the new energy policy proposes to completely deregulate this scheme. |
| 6 | Hindi | 0.100 | इस दौरान इस कानून को लेकर राज्यों के साथ विचार-विमर्श किया जाएगा व इसके दिशा-निर्देश तैयार किए जाएंगे। | During this time, consultations will be held with the states on this law and its guidelines will be prepared. |
| 7 | Hindi | 0.100 | प्रस्तावित नई ऊर्जा नीति में 'कैप्टिव पॉवर' के उत्पादन को लाइसेंस मुक्त करने की योजना है। | The proposed new energy policy plans to deregulate the production of 'captive power.' |
| 8 | Hindi | 0.098 | इस नई नीति से अब औद्योगिक घरानों को अपनी जरूरत के लिए खुद बिजली पैदा करने के लिए कैप्टिव पॉवर प्लांट लगाने में आसानी होगी। | With this new policy, industrial houses will now find it easier to set up captive power plants to generate electricity for their own needs. |
| 9 | Hindi | 0.098 | श्रम मंत्री राव ने बताया कि मर्सर की रिपोर्ट पर सीबीटी निवेश पैटर्न को पुनर्गठित करने के बारे में अपना निर्णय लेगा। | Labor Minister Rao said that based on Mercer's report, the CBT will make its decision on restructuring the investment pattern. |
| 10 | Urdu | 0.096 | تاہم اس وقت تک عوام، صحت، اور سرکاری احکامات کو عملاً وری دی جائے گی۔ | However, until then, public, health, and government directives will be implemented. |
| 11 | Hindi | 0.091 | संसद से पारित विधेयक पर राष्ट्रपति के हस्ताक्षर हो जाने के बाद मंत्रालय अब इसके दिशा-निर्देश तैयार करने में जुटा है। | After the bill passed by Parliament has been signed by the President, the ministry is now engaged in preparing its guidelines. |
| 12 | Hindi | 0.090 | सरकार की कोशिश है कि ज्यादा से ज्यादा औद्योगिक घराने अपने लिए खुद बिजली उत्पादित कर बाकी बची बिजली ग्रिड को बेच दें। | The government is trying to get as many industrial houses as possible to produce electricity for themselves and sell the surplus to the grid. |
| 13 | Hindi | 0.090 | राज्य सरकारें भी इस योजना को बढ़ावा देने की बजाए इस पर टैक्स समेत कई तरह के अंकुश लगाती रहीं हैं। | State governments have also continued to impose various restrictions including taxes on this scheme rather than promoting it. |
| 14 | Hindi | 0.090 | सचिव ने कहा कि इस आयोग के गठन के बाद सरकार अपने आप बच्चों की शिक्षा, स्वास्थ्य और विकास पर राशि खर्च करने के लिए बाध्य होगी। | The secretary said that after the formation of this commission, the government will automatically be obligated to spend money on children's education, health, and development. |
| 15 | Portuguese | 0.089 | O Governo ainda não delineou os contornos definitivos da operação, o que deverá acontecer no final de Abril ou princípio de Maio. | The Government has not yet outlined the definitive parameters of the operation, which should happen at the end of April or beginning of May. |
| 16 | Tamil | 0.088 | நாடு முழுவதும் விமானப் போக்குவரத்தில் ஏற்பட்டு வரும் வளர்ச்சியைக் கருத்தில் கொண்டு, முக்கிய நகரங்களில் உள்ள விமான நிலையங்கள் மேம்படுத்தப்படும். | Considering the growth in air traffic across the country, airports in major cities will be upgraded. |
| 17 | Chinese | 0.088 | 這樣順應民心，有利於百廢待舉，恢復元氣，實行切實有效的管理。 | This accords with the will of the people and is conducive to reviving everything that has fallen into disrepair, restoring vitality, and implementing practical and effective administration. |
| 18 | Urdu | 0.086 | مرکزی وزیر اقلیتی بہبود سلمان خورشید نے بھی اس قانون میں ترمیم کا وعدہ کیا ہے۔ | Central Minority Welfare Minister Salman Khurshid has also promised to amend this law. |
| 19 | Urdu | 0.086 | اگر حکومت نومبر یا دسمبر 09 میں انتخابات کا انعقاد عمل میں لانے کے احکامات دیتی ہے تو بلدیہ کے لیے سہولت ہوگی۔ | If the government orders elections in November or December 2009, it will be convenient for the municipality. |
| 20 | Dutch | 0.086 | Volgens de Servische premier kan beter de federale grondwet worden vernieuwd. | According to the Serbian prime minister, it would be better to renew the federal constitution. |
| 21 | Hindi | 0.086 | कैप्टिव पॉवर योजना के तहत २५ मेगावॉट क्षमता तक के प्लांट लगाने का प्रावधान है। | The captive power scheme provides for the installation of plants up to 25 megawatt capacity. |
| 22 | Croatian | 0.085 | Siguran sam kako će se reforme intenzivirati tijekom sljedećih nekoliko mjeseci. | I am confident that reforms will intensify over the next few months. |
| 23 | French | 0.085 | En premier lieu, réduire les dépenses. | First of all, reduce expenditures. |
| 24 | Japanese | 0.085 | また、使用期限が明記されていない用途についても2014年に見直しをすることが明記されている。 | It is also stipulated that uses for which no expiration date is specified will be reviewed in 2014. |
| 25 | Ukrainian | 0.085 | Кабмін затвердив реконструкцію "антрацитових" блоків ТЕС без зміни виду палива. | The Cabinet of Ministers approved the reconstruction of the "anthracite" blocks of thermal power stations without changing the type of fuel. |

**Language weights:** Hindi (11), Urdu (4), Slovak, Portuguese, Tamil, Chinese, Dutch, Croatian, French, Japanese, Ukrainian.

**Term/semantic pattern:** Legislative and policy integration — laws being reformed, plans being unified, frameworks being consolidated. Hindi and Urdu dominate overwhelmingly. The SYN exemplars are characteristically about institutional integration: parts of a policy structure being brought together into a new whole. The grammar involves future-tense plans, consultations, and the coming-into-being of something that unifies what was previously separate.

---

## DEF — DIFFERENTIATING × SIGNIFICANCE

**Establish what holds.** A value, assessment, or position is revised without changing the interpretive frame itself. The frame stays; what is held within it shifts.

**Top 25 exemplars by discrimination margin:**

| # | Language | Δ | Original | Translation |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Japanese | 0.117 | どうやら書き込み数がそのまま視聴率と相関しているとは言えないようだ。 | It seems one cannot say that the number of posts directly correlates with viewership ratings. |
| 2 | Swedish | 0.102 | "Jag är själv inte särskilt villig att dra långtgående slutsatser ur materialet," säger Åke Nilsson. | "I myself am not particularly willing to draw far-reaching conclusions from the material," says Åke Nilsson. |
| 3 | English | 0.095 | You people think it is race, but it is not. | — |
| 4 | Czech | 0.093 | Nemohu přece věřit statistice, když sám vím, jak nahodile se údaje zjišťují, tvrdí M. Šimáček. | "I cannot believe statistics, knowing myself how randomly data is collected," claims M. Šimáček. |
| 5 | Arabic | 0.091 | وما يصح لمقالة انتقادية في مجلة أسبوعية لا يصح بالضرورة موضوعاً للوكالة. | What is appropriate for a critical article in a weekly magazine is not necessarily appropriate as a topic for the agency. |
| 6 | Russian | 0.091 | Доказательства оскорблений выглядят даже несколько юмористично, а аргументы обвинения написаны на таком языке, который характерен... | The evidence of insults appears even somewhat humorous, and the prosecution's arguments are written in language that is characteristic of... |
| 7 | Vietnamese | 0.090 | Tâm lý đó không phù hợp với người trực tiếp đánh ghen... | That mentality is not appropriate for someone directly engaging in jealous confrontation... |
| 8 | Finnish | 0.089 | Todellisuus on usein kuitenkin muuta: moni ei halua myöntää julkisesti, että seksi olisi suhteessa huonoa. | Reality is often different, however: many people don't want to publicly admit that sex in a relationship is bad. |
| 9 | Urdu | 0.088 | انہوں نے کہا کہ کپتان یونس خان کی ناراضگی کے بارے میں باتیں درست نہیں ہیں۔ | He said that the talk about captain Younis Khan's displeasure is not correct. |
| 10 | Russian | 0.088 | Доказать нельзя ничего (вернее — можно доказать что угодно). | Nothing can be proven (more precisely — anything can be proven). |
| 11 | Polish | 0.087 | I nie mogę się zgodzić z nazwaniem tego personalizmem. | And I cannot agree with calling this personalism. |
| 12 | Russian | 0.087 | Мы ж не в Думе, не на ТВ — давайте говорить честно. | We're not in the Duma, not on TV — let's speak honestly. |
| 13 | Russian | 0.087 | Так что никакого, ну ни малейшего восторга по отношению к демократии и свободному голосованию я не испытываю. | So I feel absolutely no, not the slightest enthusiasm regarding democracy and free voting. |
| 14 | Russian | 0.086 | Но точно так же я не верю в "благую весть", которую России принесет честное голосование за Рогозина. | But I equally don't believe in the "good news" that honest voting for Rogozin would bring to Russia. |
| 15 | Hindi | 0.084 | अविवाहित मोदी ने कहा कि सही व्यक्ति से यह सवाल नहीं किया गया है। | Unmarried Modi said that the question has not been asked of the right person. |
| 16 | Vietnamese | 0.084 | Không có cơ sở để phán đoán kẻ khủng bố quan hệ với ông Chương ở lĩnh vực gì, Hùng tập trung nghiên cứu hành vi... | There is no basis to judge what field the terrorist had relations with Mr. Chuong in; Hung focused on studying behavior... |
| 17 | Russian | 0.084 | Словом, не стоит искать там, где светлее, — "честные выборы", "демократия". | In short, one shouldn't look where the light is brighter — "honest elections," "democracy." |
| 18 | Ukrainian | 0.081 | На це все "реальна" критика не дає ніякої відповіді. | To all this, "real" criticism gives no answer whatsoever. |
| 19 | Italian | 0.081 | "Qui la cultura non c'entra" — afferma —. | "Culture has nothing to do with it here," he asserts. |
| 20 | Hebrew | 0.081 | עם זאת, גם הקרנות בעלות השמות הגדולים אינן בהכרח מעיינות החשיבה הליברלית הסטריאוטיפית. | Nevertheless, even the funds with big names are not necessarily the stereotypical fountains of liberal thinking. |
| 21 | Ukrainian | 0.080 | Нам, правда, кажуть, що "Донцов не проводив, а тільки зручно грав на настроях і захопленні модними гаслами". | We are told, admittedly, that "Dontsov was not leading, but merely conveniently playing on moods and enthusiasm for fashionable slogans." |
| 22 | Russian | 0.079 | Итак: в кровавые сценарии не верю. | So then: I don't believe in bloody scenarios. |
| 23 | Slovenian | 0.078 | To, kar trdi, še zdaleč ne drži. | What he claims is far from true. |
| 24 | Italian | 0.077 | "Ma no, non è così" — replica Ante —. | "But no, it's not like that," Ante replies. |
| 25 | Urdu | 0.077 | میں نہیں جانتا کہ پرکاش کرت اب ڈی ایم کے کے تعلق سے اس طرح کی بیان بازی کیوں کر رہے ہیں۔ | I don't know why Prakash Karat is now making such statements regarding the DMK. |

**Language weights:** Russian (7), Ukrainian (2), Vietnamese (2), Urdu (2), Italian (2), Japanese, Swedish, English, Czech, Arabic, Finnish, Hindi, Polish, Hebrew, Slovenian.

**Term/semantic pattern:** Correction, counter-assertion, skepticism about a prevailing framing. The DEF position is occupied by clauses that establish what holds within an existing frame — "it is not race," "one cannot say that," "nothing can be proven," "what he claims is far from true." Russian opinion journalism dominates. The grammatical pattern is consistently disputative or corrective: a prior characterization is being changed, not the frame that produces it.

---

## EVA — RELATING × SIGNIFICANCE

**Render judgment.** Two incompatible interpretive positions are both present at once — not resolved, not reduced, held under evaluation.

**Top 25 exemplars by discrimination margin:**

| # | Language | Δ | Original | Translation |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Slovak | 0.079 | "Dobre, chlapče," súhlasil Fil. | "All right, boy," Fil agreed. |
| 2 | Vietnamese | 0.069 | Ông Chương nhớ có một lần bà vợ hàng xóm nói rất thích căn nhà ông... | Mr. Chuong recalled that once the neighbor's wife said she liked his house very much... |
| 3 | Wolof | 0.068 | Mu ni ko: "aah, gis naa benn bi de muy gudd fan gi, bi ci des kay a ma wóorul". | He said to him: "ah, I see that one you like that bench, the one that was given to me." |
| 4 | Slovak | 0.067 | "I mne sa raz snívalo, že budem učiť najväčšieho hrdinu všetkých čias," vyhlásil Fil. | "I too once dreamed that I would teach the greatest hero of all time," declared Fil. |
| 5 | Turkish | 0.066 | Herkesin zamanı önemli, dedi Kerem. | Everyone's time is important, Kerem said. |
| 6 | Slovak | 0.066 | Vyzeráte úžasne!" vravel trom zošúvereným babizniám. | "You look amazing!" he said to the three shrunken old women. |
| 7 | Turkish | 0.066 | Evet; bir kadın o, dedi Kerem. | Yes; she is a woman, Kerem said. |
| 8 | Ancient Greek | 0.066 | ὁ δὲ καὶ γινώσκειν ἔφη καὶ ἀρεστὸν εἶναι πᾶν τὸ ἂν βασιλεὺς ἔρδῃ. | And he said both that he knew and that everything the king did was agreeable. |
| 9 | Vietnamese | 0.063 | Có lẽ vì lịch sự Hùng cũng nói: "Tôi cũng thấy hình như gặp ông ở đâu." | Perhaps out of politeness, Hung also said: "I also feel like I've met you somewhere." |
| 10 | Danish | 0.062 | "De er s'gu ret flot," sagde jeg. | "They're really quite handsome," I said. |
| 11 | Finnish | 0.062 | Siksi kiitän tästä hetkestä; perheestä, kodista ja työstä. | Therefore I am grateful for this moment; for family, home, and work. |
| 12 | Turkish | 0.062 | İkimiz de aynı durumdayız, demişti, dedi. | We are both in the same situation, she had said, he said. |
| 13 | Czech | 0.061 | Ty a tvůj úžasný manžel jste pro mě důvodem k respektu a opřímě doufám, že spolu učiníte kroky ke šťastnému a skvělému životu. | You and your wonderful husband are a reason for me to have respect, and I sincerely hope you will together take steps toward a happy and wonderful life. |
| 14 | Slovak | 0.061 | "Dobre," súhlasil napokon presvedčený Fil. | "All right," agreed the finally convinced Fil. |
| 15 | Turkish | 0.061 | Bir insanın ruhundan geliyorum ben, dedi. | I come from a person's soul, he said. |
| 16 | Chinese | 0.061 | 韋德也非常崇拜他的姐姐，他說她擁有堅強的意志力。 | Wade also greatly admires his older sister; he said she has strong willpower. |
| 17 | Vietnamese | 0.061 | "Tại sao bà ta lại thích nhà của ông?" | "Why does she like your house?" |
| 18 | Vietnamese | 0.061 | Chúng em thường gọi đùa hiên là nàng tiên nhỏ... | We often jokingly call the veranda the little fairy... |
| 19 | Vietnamese | 0.061 | Nguyễn tiến đạt đã chọn viết về gia đình ấy, đọc thấy ấm lòng... | Nguyen Tien Dat chose to write about that family; reading it warms the heart... |
| 20 | Czech | 0.061 | Vy a váš milý manžel mi prokazujete velkou čest a já upřímně věřím, že společně uděláte všechno pro šťastný a skvělý život. | You and your dear husband do me great honor and I sincerely believe you will do everything together for a happy and wonderful life. |
| 21 | Slovak | 0.059 | "Nesklamem ťa, otec," zvolal Herkules, keď s Pegasom leteli na ostrov Idra. | "I will not disappoint you, father," cried Hercules as he and Pegasus flew to the island of Hydra. |
| 22 | Slovak | 0.058 | Vidieť, že je slušne vychovaný, pretože počkal, kým zjem prvé sústo, až potom sa pustil do jedla. | One can see he was raised well, because he waited until I took the first bite before he started eating. |
| 23 | Slovak | 0.058 | Lori zrejme vytušila, že sa mi chce piť. | Lori apparently sensed that I was thirsty. |
| 24 | Bulgarian | 0.058 | Надявах се, че щеше да каже. | I was hoping she would say it. |
| 25 | Slovak | 0.057 | Ak sa Sokrates hlási za Alkibiadovho trvalého obdivovateľa, tak sa to vzťahuje na Alkibiadovu dušu. | If Socrates presents himself as Alcibiades's constant admirer, this refers to Alcibiades's soul. |

**Language weights:** Slovak (8), Vietnamese (5), Turkish (4), Czech (2), Ancient Greek, Wolof, Danish, Finnish, Chinese, Bulgarian.

**Term/semantic pattern:** Reported speech and social navigation — someone saying something that simultaneously concedes and maintains their position. "All right," agreed Fil. "Everyone's time is important," Kerem said. "I also feel like I've met you somewhere." The EVA position is saturated with indirect speech, diplomatic politeness, and the language of characters holding multiple social positions at once. Slovak fiction, Vietnamese conversation, and Turkish reported speech carry this most distinctly.

---

## REC — GENERATING × SIGNIFICANCE

**Change the frame itself.** The interpretive structure through which something is understood undergoes transformation. Not establishing a value within a frame (DEF) but reconstituting the frame.

**Top 25 exemplars by discrimination margin:**

| # | Language | Δ | Original | Translation |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | German | 0.063 | Ich muss sagen, insgesamt habe ich einen eher negativen ersten Eindruck von diesem Unternehmen erhalten. | I have to say, overall I have received a rather negative first impression of this company. |
| 2 | Arabic | 0.055 | ووجه غرين، الساعي إلى احراز الذهب الأولمبي، إنذاراً إلى الذين يشككون في قدرته على تحقيق حلمه الأولمبي بعد خسارته 3 سباقات. | Green, who is seeking Olympic gold, issued a warning to those who doubt his ability to achieve his Olympic dream after losing 3 races. |
| 3 | Italian | 0.053 | E forse il finanziere toscano ha colto l'occasione per una piccola vendetta nei confronti degli svizzeri che stavano decidendo... | And perhaps the Tuscan financier seized the opportunity for a small act of revenge against the Swiss who were deciding... |
| 4 | French | 0.052 | Dans la chanson "Nigivir", toujours en grand provocateur, Francky Vincent règle ses comptes. | In the song "Nigivir," always the great provocateur, Francky Vincent settles scores. |
| 5 | Portuguese | 0.051 | Apesar da veracidade ainda hoje comprovável, na ocasião Fernando Henrique me fez graves acusações. | Despite the veracity still provable today, on that occasion Fernando Henrique made serious accusations against me. |
| 6 | Italian | 0.051 | Allora mi sono innervosita e ho temuto la beffa. | Then I got nervous and feared I was being made a fool of. |
| 7 | Italian | 0.049 | Tanto da far ritenere al giudice Salvini che nel Veronese operasse un'altra Gladio, ancor più deviata di quella "ufficiale". | So much so as to lead Judge Salvini to believe that another Gladio was operating in the Verona area, even more deviant than the "official" one. |
| 8 | German | 0.048 | In diesem Moment habe ich mich sehr angegriffen gefühlt. | In that moment I felt very attacked. |
| 9 | Indonesian | 0.048 | Bila tidak, tekadnya untuk bertarung kembali akan membuat dunia melihat dia sebagai seorang penipu ulung dan pembohong politik. | If not, his determination to fight again will make the world see him as a great swindler and political liar. |
| 10 | German | 0.047 | Leider hat sich mein Eindruck jetzt total umgekehrt. | Unfortunately my impression has now completely reversed. |
| 11 | Italian | 0.047 | "Bossi quando parla si copre di ridicolo, dovrebbe bastare questo a punirlo." | "Bossi covers himself in ridicule when he speaks; this should be enough to punish him." |
| 12 | Japanese | 0.046 | 他では余してもらえない手触り感のヘアカラーは感動ものでした。 | The hair color with a texture you can't get elsewhere was truly moving. |
| 13 | Norwegian | 0.045 | Men da bildet endelig ble tatt i Stortingets vandrehall, benyttet Jensen anledningen til å spille forurettet på en måte som... | But when the picture was finally taken in the Storting lobby, Jensen seized the opportunity to play offended in a way that... |
| 14 | German | 0.045 | Nach den vorherigen Beurteilungen hätte ich anderes erwartet. | Based on previous reviews, I would have expected something different. |
| 15 | French | 0.044 | Une mention remarquable doit être ici décernée à une série de reportages produite par la télévision publique britannique. | A notable mention must be awarded here to a series of reports produced by the British public television. |
| 16 | French | 0.044 | Travail de très grande qualité exécuté par un imprimeur artisan passionné. | Work of very high quality executed by a passionate artisan printer. |
| 17 | French | 0.043 | Cela lui donne un aspect «formel». | This gives it a "formal" aspect. |
| 18 | French | 0.042 | Elle traduisit les meilleurs des ouvrages de la littérature classique étrangère et écrivit des articles de critique littéraire. | She translated the best works of foreign classical literature and wrote literary criticism articles. |
| 19 | Spanish | 0.041 | Así que cuidado porque el trato es lo peor que encontrado nunca. | So be careful because the treatment is the worst I have ever encountered. |
| 20 | Chinese | 0.041 | 醫生變得十分自負，並讓在航海家號上的朋友們感到很不愉快。 | The doctor became very arrogant and made his friends on the Voyager feel very uncomfortable. |
| 21 | German | 0.041 | Für das Geld bekomme ich wo anders eine richtig schöne Behandlung mit besserem Ergebnis. | For that money I can get a really nice treatment with better results elsewhere. |
| 22 | Dutch | 0.040 | Retoriek werd een welbewust aangeleerd en steeds zelfverzekerder gehanteerd politiek wapen. | Rhetoric became a deliberately learned and increasingly confidently wielded political weapon. |
| 23 | Dutch | 0.038 | Voor Attje, ook wel de "vliegende huisvrouw" genoemd, draaide deze titelstrijd op een bittere teleurstelling uit. | For Attje, also known as the "flying housewife," this championship contest turned into a bitter disappointment. |
| 24 | German | 0.038 | Die Bedienung war unfreundlich und als Paintball-Einsteiger wurde einem das Spiel überhaupt nicht vermittelt. | The service was unfriendly and as a paintball beginner the game was not explained at all. |
| 25 | Hungarian | 0.037 | Ha már így esett, és nem mond le, legalább annyit megtehetne a magánbűnbe süppedt közszereplő, hogy megköveti feljelentőjét. | If it has come to this and he is not resigning, at least the public figure sunk in private sin could apologize to those who reported him. |

**Language weights:** German (7), French (5), Italian (4), Dutch (2), Arabic, Portuguese, Indonesian, Norwegian, Japanese, Spanish, Chinese, Hungarian.

**Term/semantic pattern:** Revised total assessments — first impressions reversed, frames reconstituted, people or situations re-characterized at the level of their identity. "My impression has completely reversed." "The world will see him as a swindler." "Covers himself in ridicule." "Rhetoric became a political weapon." REC clauses re-categorize rather than revise — they don't say "this was worse than expected" but "this was a different kind of thing entirely." German and French judgmental prose carry it most distinctly.

---

---

# Canonical Examples: The Resolution Face

**Record ID:** wiki:canonical-examples-the-resolution-face  
**DB ID:** 61  
**Status:** published  
**Updated:** 2026-03-19T01:25:52.015Z  

---

> *Each position defined by what the embedding space actually finds geometrically characteristic of it — the top-ranked clauses by discrimination margin. The Site face answers: where in reality is the target located? It crosses Domain with Object, describing the phenomenological terrain before any operation is performed.*

---

The Site face is **Domain × Object** — the crossing of *what level of reality the target belongs to* with *what grain of object it is*.

| Domain axis (Q2) | Object axis (Q3) |
| --- | --- |
| EXISTENCE — being, presence, the substrate of the real | CONDITION — ambient background, ground, what is present before anything is picked out |
| STRUCTURE — organization, relation, system | ENTITY — a specific thing, graspable, nameable, discrete |
| SIGNIFICANCE — meaning, interpretation, value, the frame | PATTERN — a recurring regularity, a type, a category |

The nine terrain types arise from crossing these two axes. The cell address is Domain × Object.

---

## Void — EXISTENCE × CONDITION

**The ambient substrate of being.** What is present as background before anything is picked out — weather, atmosphere, the condition of a region before any particular event occurs in it.

**Top 25 exemplars by discrimination margin:**

| # | Language | Δ | Original | Translation |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Hindi | 0.092 | उत्तर भारत के कई स्थानों में बृहस्पतिवार की सुबह तक भारी वर्षा रिकॉर्ड की गई। | Heavy rainfall was recorded at several locations in northern India until Thursday morning. |
| 2 | Tamil | 0.074 | 2022-ம் ஆண்டில் ஜெர்மனியில் அணுஉலைக் கூடங்களே இல்லாத நிலை ஏற்பட வேண்டும் என்பது தான் அது. | That is the goal that there should be a situation in Germany in 2022 where there are no nuclear reactors at all. |
| 3 | Hindi | 0.072 | सप्ताह के दौरान औसत से ३२ फीसदी कम पानी बरसा। | Rainfall during the week was 32 percent below average. |
| 4 | Portuguese | 0.071 | Porque a produção por hectare em África tem diminuído drasticamente, o campo está a desertificar-se. | Because production per hectare in Africa has decreased drastically, the countryside is becoming desert. |
| 5 | Vietnamese | 0.070 | Trời tối hẳn và đối tượng chìm vào biển người hối hả... | The sky went completely dark and the subject was swallowed into a sea of rushing people... |
| 6 | Korean | 0.069 | 1월에는 20여 년 만에 발생한 기록적인 한파와 폭설로 인해 여러 가지 사건 사고가 발생했다. | In January, record-breaking cold and heavy snowfall not seen in over 20 years caused various incidents and accidents. |
| 7 | Hindi | 0.063 | देश का एक तिहाई हिस्सा सूखे की चपेट में आ चुका है। | A third of the country has already been gripped by drought. |
| 8 | Korean | 0.063 | 그러나 다음날인 6일 새벽에는 대전을 비롯한 충청지역에 비 내리는 곳이 많겠다. | However, in the early morning of the 6th, the next day, rain is expected in many areas including Daejeon and the Chungcheong region. |
| 9 | Urdu | 0.062 | ضلع عادل آباد کے اطراف و اکناف کے مواضعات میں بھی تیز بارش گرج چمک کے دوران ہونے کی اطلاعات ملی ہیں۔ | Reports have been received of heavy rain with thunder and lightning in the villages around and about Adilabad district. |
| 10 | Tamil | 0.061 | அணுசக்தி ஒப்பந்தம் கையெழுத்தானதால் அத்துறையிலும் இனி இரு நாடுகளும் கூட்டாக ஈடுபடும் வாய்ப்பு பிரகாசமடைந்துள்ளது. | Since the nuclear agreement has been signed, the opportunity for the two countries to cooperate in that field has also brightened. |
| 11 | Tamil | 0.061 | இதனால், தமிழகத்தின் வாழ்வாதரங்களுக்கு பாதுகாப்பற்ற சூழல் நிலவுகிறது. | Because of this, an unsafe environment prevails for the livelihoods of Tamil Nadu. |
| 12 | Italian | 0.058 | la luce solare si offuscò e i funghi ereditarono la terra. | The sunlight darkened and the fungi inherited the earth. |
| 13 | Dutch | 0.057 | Het regende gisteren klachten in 't Rijnmondgebied over luchtverontreiniging. | Yesterday it rained complaints in the Rhine-Maas delta region about air pollution. |
| 14 | Urdu | 0.057 | برقی پراجکٹس کے قیام میں حکومت کی بدنیتی کی وجہ سے مقامی عوام کو مسائل کا خطرہ ہے۔ | Due to the government's bad faith in establishing power projects, local people face the threat of problems. |
| 15 | Hindi | 0.053 | असम में ९० लाख से ज्यादा लोग बाढ़ से प्रभावित हुए हैं। | More than 9 million people in Assam have been affected by flooding. |
| 16 | Hindi | 0.053 | देश अभी बिजली की १३ फीसदी कमी से जूझ रहा है। | The country is currently struggling with a 13 percent power deficit. |
| 17 | Chinese | 0.052 | 春天天氣週期變化，也可能因寒冷旋渦的影響出現雷雨。 | Spring weather changes cyclically and thunderstorms may also occur due to the influence of cold vortices. |
| 18 | Portuguese | 0.050 | Muita dessa desertificação tem sido disfarçada com o uso crescente de adubos, não tanto em África como na Índia e noutros sítios. | Much of this desertification has been disguised by the increasing use of fertilizers, not so much in Africa as in India and other places. |
| 19 | Korean | 0.045 | 사람이 없는 곳이라 스피커도 고음에서 찢어지는 소리 남. | Since there is no one there, the speaker also makes a tearing sound at high volume. |
| 20 | Finnish | 0.043 | Taivas oli tähtikirkas ja pakkanen, laskiessaan yöllä 20 asteeseen, ripisteli puiden latvoja ja paukutteli torpan seinämiä. | The sky was star-clear and the frost, dropping to 20 degrees at night, was nipping at the treetops and cracking the walls of the cottage. |
| 21 | Spanish | 0.043 | Como se ve si una de las dos fuerzas fallase los acontecimientos se sucederían muy repentinamente hasta volver a recuperar el equilibrio. | As can be seen, if one of the two forces were to fail, events would unfold very rapidly until equilibrium was restored. |
| 22 | Polish | 0.042 | Księżyc wypłynął zza chmury, w trawie potrzaskiwały świerszcze. | The moon emerged from behind a cloud; crickets chirped in the grass. |
| 23 | Ukrainian | 0.041 | З того часу не стало на землі ясного спокою, потьмарилась блискуча божа мрія. | Since then, clear peace has gone from the earth, the shining divine dream has grown dark. |
| 24 | Hindi | 0.041 | इस मंदिर में अखंड धूनी जलती रहती है। | In this temple an unceasing sacred fire burns continuously. |
| 25 | Spanish | 0.041 | Las habitaciones tenian las paredes desconchadas, no funcionaba el aire acondicionado en ninguna de las habitaciones... | The rooms had peeling walls, the air conditioning didn't work in any of the rooms... |

**Language weights:** Hindi (7), Tamil (3), Korean (3), Urdu (2), Portuguese (2), Spanish (2), Vietnamese, Italian, Dutch, Chinese, Finnish, Polish, Ukrainian.

**Term/semantic pattern:** Ambient conditions as subject — rainfall recorded, drought spreading, frost at night, a region in darkness. Void clauses have no specific agent and no discrete event; they describe the condition of a territory or environment as a whole before anything particular happens in it.

---

## Entity — EXISTENCE × ENTITY

**A specific existent.** This person, this object, this event — discrete, graspable, nameable. The most concrete terrain in the capacity ground.

**Top 25 exemplars by discrimination margin:**

| # | Language | Δ | Original | Translation |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | French | 0.089 | Il renoua avec le succès vers la fin de la guerre, avant de mourir en 1925. | He regained success toward the end of the war, before dying in 1925. |

| 11 | Dutch | 0.070 | De achttienjarige schippersknecht J. J. Christiaansen uit Breskens is vannacht door koolmonoxydevergiftiging om het leven gekomen. | The eighteen-year-old boathand J. J. Christiaansen from Breskens died last night of carbon monoxide poisoning. |
| 12 | Hebrew | 0.070 | כתוצאה מזריקת אבנים לעבר אוטובוס ישראלי בחלחול, נפצעה ביום שישי קל תיירת בראשה. | As a result of stone-throwing at an Israeli bus in Halhul, a tourist was slightly wounded in the head on Friday. |
| 13 | Hebrew | 0.069 | משאית פגעה במכוניתו, והוא נהרג במקום. | A truck struck his car and he was killed on the spot. |

| 16 | French | 0.068 | Le conflit dure un jour et Goshou perd la vie. | The conflict lasts one day and Goshou loses his life. |

| 18 | Spanish | 0.067 | Muere el 21 de julio de 1984. | He dies on July 21, 1984. |

| 21 | French | 0.066 | Son tombeau y fut retrouvé lorsque les ruines furent explorées au XIXe siècle. | His tomb was found there when the ruins were explored in the 19th century. |
| 22 | Arabic | 0.065 | وأثارت هذه العملية تظاهرات دامية في الأراضي الفلسطينية في أيلول/سبتمبر 1996 أوقعت أكثر من 80 قتيلاً. | This operation sparked bloody protests in the Palestinian territories in September 1996, causing more than 80 deaths. |
| 23 | Dutch | 0.065 | Hij liep een shock op en kneusde enkele ribben. | He went into shock and bruised several ribs. |
| 24 | Urdu | 0.065 | اتنے میں تیسرے نوجوان نے اپنا عمل پورا کیا جس سے شیر کے مردہ جسم میں جان آ گئی۔ | At that point the third young man completed his act, which brought life back into the dead body of the lion. |
| 25 | English | 0.064 | One week after that declaration, ONLY ONE WEEK LATER, Brian Epstein, forger of the Beatle farce, died from an overdose. | — |

**Language weights:** French (7), Tamil (3), Spanish (2), Hebrew (2), Dutch (2), Japanese (2), Italian, German, English (2), Hungarian, Portuguese, Arabic, Urdu.

**Term/semantic pattern:** Specific deaths, specific dates, specific named persons and their fates. Entity is the terrain of historical chronicle — this person died on this date in this place; this event occurred; this name became this fact. French historical prose is the dominant carrier, consistently describing discrete irreversible events involving named individuals.

---

## Kind — EXISTENCE × PATTERN

**A type or category.** Not any particular instance but the recurring class — the regularity of a species, a demographic, a disease category. Existence is patterned here rather than instantiated.

**Top 25 exemplars by discrimination margin:**

| # | Language | Δ | Original | Translation |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Swedish | 0.089 | Under den tid som det tar att läsa den här meningen föds elva människor till världen. | In the time it takes to read this sentence, eleven people are born into the world. |
| 2 | Swedish | 0.083 | Spädbarnsdödligheten har minskat särskilt kraftigt; det är inte så att varje kvinna föder fler barn än förr, men de som föds överlever i högre grad. | Infant mortality has decreased particularly sharply; it is not that each woman has more children than before, but those who are born survive to a greater degree. |
| 3 | Swedish | 0.080 | Ungefär en procent av befolkningen har haft eller har denna sjukdom. | Approximately one percent of the population has had or has this disease. |
| 4 | Swedish | 0.080 | Många svåra sjukdomar som malaria, smittkoppor och spetälska trängs alltmer tillbaka genom aktiva hälsovårdsinsatser. | Many serious diseases such as malaria, smallpox and leprosy are increasingly being pushed back through active health measures. |
| 5 | Indonesian | 0.076 | Lambda Indonesia dan organisasi sejenis lainnya bermunculan pada akhir tahun 1980-an dan 1990-an. | Lambda Indonesia and similar organizations emerged at the end of the 1980s and 1990s. |
| 6 | Russian | 0.074 | А на деле число полуголодных людей растет в разы. | But in reality the number of half-starved people is growing many times over. |
| 7 | Swedish | 0.070 | Folkökningen i världen är så stor att antalet människor som varken kan läsa eller skriva (analfabeter) ökar. | Population growth in the world is so great that the number of people who can neither read nor write (illiterates) is increasing. |
| 8 | Polish | 0.068 | Niestety, wiele z tych zabaw kończy się wypadkami. | Unfortunately, many of these games end in accidents. |
| 9 | Swedish | 0.067 | Jordens sammanlagda befolkning ökar f.n. med 70-80 miljoner människor om året, och ökningen är störst där människorna är fattigast. | The world's total population is currently increasing by 70-80 million people per year, and the increase is greatest where people are poorest. |
| 10 | Swedish | 0.066 | De blev i många fall gravida oavsiktligt. | In many cases they became pregnant unintentionally. |
| 11 | Portuguese | 0.066 | Desempregados com licenciatura aumentaram 51 por cento em 1996. | Unemployed people with a university degree increased 51 percent in 1996. |
| 12 | Russian | 0.065 | Европа (и Россия) мало рожают, по-стариковски долго болеют. | Europe (and Russia) has few births and falls ill for long periods in an aged manner. |
| 13 | Swedish | 0.063 | Uppskattningsvis 400 milj lider av ögonsjukdomen trakom. | An estimated 400 million suffer from the eye disease trachoma. |
| 14 | Italian | 0.062 | Vi sono migliaia di casi di questo genere. | There are thousands of cases of this kind. |
| 15 | Catalan | 0.062 | Cada dia n'aconsegueixen volar uns quants. | Every day a few of them manage to fly. |
| 16 | Hungarian | 0.061 | És még egy riasztó adat: 1999-ben 5,6 millió felnőttet és gyermeket fertőzött meg az AIDS kialakulását okozó HIV-vírus. | And one more alarming figure: in 1999 the HIV virus causing AIDS infected 5.6 million adults and children. |
| 17 | Hungarian | 0.061 | Új népszokás született, aki unatkozik, kimegy a ház elé, és elhányja a havat. | A new folk custom was born: whoever is bored goes out in front of the house and shovels the snow. |
| 18 | Swedish | 0.060 | Turkiets folkmängd ökar med en miljon om året och fördubblas vart 25:e år. | Turkey's population increases by one million per year and doubles every 25 years. |
| 19 | English | 0.060 | Male cats very seldom live past 14-15 years. | — |
| 20 | Swedish | 0.059 | Om tio år finns det ungefär 60 jättestäder, alltså städer som har mer än 2,5 miljoner invånare hopklumpade. | In ten years there will be approximately 60 giant cities, that is cities with more than 2.5 million inhabitants clustered together. |
| 21 | Swedish | 0.057 | Om det så ska kosta oss ytterligare 50000 fall av blodkräfta per år. | Even if it costs us an additional 50,000 cases of leukemia per year. |
| 22 | Slovenian | 0.056 | Kadar pride v tem procesu do motnje, izbruhne smrtna bolezen. | When a disturbance occurs in this process, a fatal disease breaks out. |
| 23 | Slovenian | 0.055 | V Evropi se rodi z razcepljeno ustnico in razcepljenim nebom vsak 500. otrok. | In Europe, every 500th child is born with a cleft lip and palate. |
| 24 | Russian | 0.052 | Да и новые экономические вузы и факультеты появляются сейчас все реже — специалистов и так много. | And new economics universities and faculties are appearing increasingly rarely — there are already too many specialists. |
| 25 | Bulgarian | 0.051 | Все повече се увеличават случаите на вирусни инфекции на горните дихателни пътища, протичащи с повишена температура. | Cases of viral infections of the upper respiratory tract with elevated temperature are increasingly on the rise. |

**Language weights:** Swedish (11), Russian (3), Hungarian (2), Slovenian (2), Indonesian, Polish, Portuguese, Italian, Catalan, English, Bulgarian.

**Term/semantic pattern:** Population statistics, disease prevalence, demographic patterns. Kind clauses never refer to an individual — they operate at the level of types, rates, and categories. "Eleven people are born" not "a child was born." "One percent of the population" not "the patient." Swedish statistical prose dominates overwhelmingly, with its tradition of presenting demographic and epidemiological categories.

---

## Field — STRUCTURE × CONDITION

**The ambient relational environment.** The structural conditions of a territory, organization, or region — what relations are in place as background before any specific connection is made.

**Top 25 exemplars by discrimination margin:**

| # | Language | Δ | Original | Translation |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | French | 0.086 | La commune dispose de 2 865 ha de terres arables et de 3 872 ha de pâturages. | The commune has 2,865 ha of arable land and 3,872 ha of pastures. |
| 2 | French | 0.074 | On y retrouve les lieux de culte, la place, la mairie, et les magasins de toutes sortes. | There one finds places of worship, the square, the town hall, and shops of all kinds. |
| 3 | Slovenian | 0.074 | V Čepincih je obilo možnosti za pešačenje in kolesarjenje, saj poti vodijo na vse strani. | In Čepinci there are ample opportunities for hiking and cycling, as paths lead in all directions. |
| 4 | French | 0.070 | L'économie de la commune est due aux entreprises individuelles, transport routier de marchandises et produits fermiers. | The economy of the commune depends on individual enterprises, road freight transport, and farm produce. |
| 5 | French | 0.069 | Le tracé du parc est conçu pour accueillir les pavillons des exposants. | The layout of the park is designed to accommodate the exhibitors' pavilions. |
| 6 | Chinese | 0.066 | 為方便生意往來，帶水佬在香港、澳門設有臨時居住點。 | To facilitate business dealings, the water carriers have established temporary lodging points in Hong Kong and Macau. |
| 7 | Spanish | 0.066 | Cuenta con una amplia extensión verde y arbolada, en la cual se instalan los campamentos de astures y romanos durante sus recreaciones. | It has a large green and wooded expanse in which the Asturian and Roman camps are set up during their reenactments. |
| 8 | French | 0.065 | La tribu est peuplée de 700 habitants environ. | The tribe has a population of approximately 700 inhabitants. |
| 9 | Spanish | 0.060 | Flanqueado al norte, sur y este por barreras naturales, el emplazamiento permitía a los conquistadores defender mejor el territorio. | Flanked to the north, south, and east by natural barriers, the location allowed the conquerors to better defend the territory. |
| 10 | Spanish | 0.060 | El Dniéper tiene una densa red de afluentes, más de la mitad de los ríos del país pertenecen a su cuenca hidrográfica. | The Dnieper has a dense network of tributaries; more than half the country's rivers belong to its watershed. |
| 11 | Croatian | 0.060 | Huruglica: Poslovna zajednica izrazila je nezadovoljstvo teškoćama s kojima se susreće i radi na njihovu uklanjanju. | Business community: The business community expressed dissatisfaction with the difficulties it faces and is working on their elimination. |
| 12 | Slovenian | 0.059 | Najmočnejši smo na Hrvaškem, usmerjamo se tudi v Črno goro. | We are strongest in Croatia; we are also directing ourselves toward Montenegro. |
| 13 | Indonesian | 0.059 | Struktur perekonomian masyarakatnya didominasi oleh kegiatan pertanian beserta kegiatan pendukung pertanian. | The economic structure of the community is dominated by agricultural activities and activities that support agriculture. |
| 14 | Korean | 0.057 | 2층에는 등산, 캠핑, 텐트 이월특가 상품들이 있더군요. | On the second floor there were hiking, camping, and tent clearance sale items. |
| 15 | Japanese | 0.056 | 総面積の2.08%が水地域となっている。 | 2.08% of the total area consists of water zones. |
| 16 | Slovak | 0.056 | Prešli sme okolo supermarketov, veľkoskladov a obchodných domov a mierili sme k pohoriu Squaw Peak. | We passed supermarkets, wholesale warehouses and department stores and were heading toward the Squaw Peak mountain range. |
| 17 | Spanish | 0.055 | La densidad de población era de 34,47 hab./km². | The population density was 34.47 inhabitants per km². |
| 18 | Spanish | 0.055 | Hacia el oeste se conecta con las Montañas de Prades que constituyen el límite oriental de la comarca. | To the west it connects with the Prades Mountains which form the eastern boundary of the region. |
| 19 | Spanish | 0.055 | Según la Oficina del Censo, el condado tiene un área total de, de la cual es tierra y es agua. | According to the Census Bureau, the county has a total area, of which is land and is water. |
| 20 | Spanish | 0.054 | En el año 2010 tenía una población de 8.411 habitantes y una densidad poblacional de 568.3 personas por km². | In 2010 it had a population of 8,411 inhabitants and a population density of 568.3 people per km². |
| 21 | Spanish | 0.054 | La densidad de población era de 133,45 hab./km². | The population density was 133.45 inhabitants per km². |
| 22 | Spanish | 0.053 | El 25% de los requerimientos de los forrajes para los animales del zoológico crece en tierra propia. | 25% of the fodder requirements for the zoo animals grows on its own land. |
| 23 | Spanish | 0.053 | En el Censo de 2010 tenía una población de 212 habitantes y una densidad poblacional de 524,7 personas por km². | In the 2010 Census it had a population of 212 inhabitants and a population density of 524.7 people per km². |
| 24 | Spanish | 0.052 | En los últimos años ha sido remodelado para permitir operaciones con aviones de mayor tamaño. | In recent years it has been remodeled to allow operations with larger aircraft. |
| 25 | Chinese | 0.052 | 主要街道有坡子街、洪家井、藩西巷、學院街、下黎家坡、三王街等。 | The main streets are Pozi Street, Hongjia Well, Fanxi Lane, Academy Street, Xia Lijia Slope, Sanwang Street, etc. |

**Language weights:** French (5), Spanish (9), Slovenian (2), Chinese (2), Croatian, Indonesian, Korean, Japanese, Slovak.

**Term/semantic pattern:** Territorial description — hectares of arable land, population density, roads and paths leading in all directions, economic structures, natural boundaries. Field clauses describe the ambient infrastructure of a place or organization: what is structurally present as background. French municipal and Spanish geographical Wikipedia prose dominates.

---

## Link — STRUCTURE × ENTITY

**A specific connection.** This particular bond, this named relationship, this dependency between specific identified parties. Not the architecture of connections (Network) but one concrete instance.

**Top 25 exemplars by discrimination margin:**

| # | Language | Δ | Original | Translation |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Urdu | 0.072 | ڈی ایم وکاس گوتھلوال اور ایس پی نونیت کمار رانا کو اس معاملے کی جانچ کے لیے مقرر کیا گیا ہے۔ | DM Vikas Gothalwal and SP Nunit Kumar Rana have been appointed to investigate this matter. |
| 2 | Arabic | 0.071 | وتولى جون نكومو الذي كان وزيراً للإدارة المحلية في الحكومة السابقة وزارة الداخلية بينما عُين نائب الجمهورية السابق باتريك... | John Nkomo, who had been Minister of Local Administration in the previous government, took over the Interior Ministry, while former Vice President Patrick... was appointed... |
